description_long: This object depicts two distinct residential houses situated side by side on a landscaped lot, each surrounded by trees, shrubs, and driveways. The house on the left features a modern, boxy design with flat roofs, large windows, and a fenced yard, while the house on the right has a more traditional, single-story appearance with a gable roof and a front porch. Both properties include paved driveways, with the right house having a visible car parked in front. The landscaping is lush, with numerous mature trees and well-maintained lawns providing privacy and shade. The houses are separated by a central driveway and are set on a rectangular plot with a sidewalk and street frontage. The overall scene suggests a suburban neighborhood setting with attention to detail in both architecture and landscaping.
description: Two residential houses on landscaped lots, one modern with flat roofs and one traditional with a gable roof, surrounded by trees and driveways.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, driveways, and lush landscaping with a car parked in front of the right house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyards, trees, and the modern house's rooftop features.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of both houses, the gable roof of the right house, and the flat roof of the left house.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the modern house's facade, fencing, and the traditional house's side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and standard rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Modern house with a recessed entry and fencing, traditional house with a covered front porch and steps
